# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kafka topic authorization.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

broker.id=1
listeners=PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://your-broker-ip:9092
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/logs
num.partitions=3
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2
replication.factor=3
zookeeper.connect=your-zookeeper-ip:2181
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=6000
zookeeper.sync.time.ms=200
auto.create.topics.enable=false
delete.topic.enable=true
security.inter.broker.protocol=PLAINTEXT
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=PLAIN
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=PLAIN
listener.security.protocol.map=PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.auth.SimpleAclAuthorizer
super.users=User:admin
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false
acl.enable=true
